remarks: Escape to your own private retreat on nearly three acres of lush, rolling land. This beautifully renovated residence offers the perfect balance of secluded tranquility and incredible convenience, situated just moments from Darien and Rowayton, local shopping, and just 1 mile from the Rowayton train station. Inside, experience the effortless flow of one-level living. The space is bathed in natural light, with top-tier craftsmanship and custom cabinetry throughout. Enjoy a spacious, open living area and eat-in kitchen - with Corian counters - that looks out over an expansive level backyard and an oversized deck perfect for morning coffee or evening relaxation. The primary suite is a true sanctuary, featuring a generous en-suite bath and a custom-designed walk-in California Closet. Thoughtful extras include a dedicated laundry area, an additional half-bath and a private entrance. Attached garage has extra storage space in the convenient walk-up attic. Enjoy a truly seamless lifestyle with heat, hot water, electric, and cable TV all included in the rent. Whether you're commuting from the nearby Rowayton station or just looking for a polished, turn-key space to call home, this property delivers high-end comfort in an unbeatable location.
